signals.headline: Solana Hits All-Time Record of 167 Million Monthly Token Holders with Alpenglow Upgrade Boosting Network Performance | Y
signals.raw:
Solana Hits All-Time Record of 167 Million Monthly Token Holders with Alpenglow Upgrade Boosting Network Performance | YES | HIGH confidence**  
As of April 14, 2026, Solana achieved a record 167 million monthly token holders and 148 million daily non-vote transactions, driven by the anticipated **Alpenglow consensus upgrade** reducing transaction finality to 150 milliseconds.[1]

signals.headline: Germany March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
Germany March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2.7% | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Germany's annual inflation rate rose to 2.7% in March 2026 from 1.9% in February, confirming preliminary estimates and marking the highest since January 2024, driven by a 7.2% energy price surge linked to the Iran war.[1][2][4] This official confirmation from the Federal Statistical Office on April 10 exceeds prior forecast

signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation at 2.2%, Below Forecasts | YES | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% prior, but missed market expectations of 2.4%, signaling contained pressures amid global energy volatility.[3] This recent data aligns with the central bank's 2% target and may influence markets on Bank of Korea rate decisions.[3]

signals.headline: Germany 2026 GDP Growth Forecast Halved to 0
signals.raw:
Germany 2026 GDP Growth Forecast Halved to 0.6% | YES | MED confidence**  
Leading institutes cut Germany's 2026 GDP growth forecast to +0.6% from +1.3%, citing the Iran war's energy shock, while expecting +0.9% in 2027.[4] This downward revision, reported in early April, counters earlier optimism and could impact markets on European recession risks.[4]
